title: Libraries Reinvent Their Purpose
subtitle: 在数字时代，图书馆正在华丽转身

paragraphs.en: Public libraries are undergoing remarkable transformation as they adapt to changing community needs. Far from becoming obsolete in the digital age, libraries have evolved into vibrant community centers offering far more than book lending. Modern libraries provide technology access, educational programming, and crucial social services.
paragraphs.zh: 公共图书馆正在经历显著的转型，以适应不断变化的社区需求。图书馆在数字时代远未过时，而是已发展成为充满活力的社区中心，提供的远不止书籍借阅。现代图书馆提供技术访问、教育项目和关键的社会服务。

paragraphs.en: Many libraries now function as third places—welcoming spaces between home and work where people gather informally. They offer free internet access vital for job seekers and students lacking home connectivity. Meeting rooms, maker spaces with equipment like 3D printers, and quiet study areas serve diverse community purposes.
paragraphs.zh: 许多图书馆现在作为“第三空间”运作——家庭和工作之间人们非正式聚集的欢迎场所。它们提供对求职者和缺乏家庭网络连接的学生至关重要的免费互联网访问。会议室、配备3D打印机等设备的创客空间和安静的学习区域服务于多样的社区目的。

paragraphs.en: Social work has become an unexpected library function. Librarians increasingly help patrons navigate social services, from housing assistance to healthcare enrollment. Some libraries employ social workers directly, recognizing that community members often turn to libraries as trusted, accessible institutions during times of need.
paragraphs.zh: 社会工作已成为一项出乎意料的图书馆功能。图书馆员越来越多地帮助读者获取社会服务，从住房援助到医疗保险登记。一些图书馆直接雇用社会工作者，认识到社区成员在需要时经常将图书馆作为值得信赖且容易接近的机构。

paragraphs.en: Children and families benefit particularly from library programming. Story times develop literacy and social skills in young children, while homework help supports struggling students. Summer reading programs combat learning loss during school breaks, addressing educational inequities that affect disadvantaged communities disproportionately.
paragraphs.zh: 儿童和家庭特别受益于图书馆项目。故事时间发展幼儿的读写能力和社交技能，而家庭作业辅导支持有困难的学生。暑期阅读项目对抗学校假期期间的学习流失，解决不成比例地影响弱势社区的教育不平等问题。

paragraphs.en: Despite their expanding roles, libraries face chronic underfunding in many communities. As demands increase, resources often fail to keep pace. Advocates argue that libraries provide exceptional return on public investment, offering essential services that become increasingly valuable as other institutions retreat from community support.
paragraphs.zh: 尽管角色不断扩大，图书馆在许多社区面临长期资金不足。随着需求增加，资源往往跟不上步伐。倡导者认为，图书馆提供了卓越的公共投资回报，提供的基本服务随着其他机构从社区支持中撤退而变得越来越有价值。
